validation_command: & { $files = @("public/review/index.html", "tools/fff-state.mjs", "artifacts/artifact-manifest.json", "artifacts/ARTIFACTS.md", "artifacts/sample-project-state.json", "artifacts/current-project-state.json", "artifacts/checkpoint-readback-result.json", "artifacts/profile-ghost-smoke-result.json", "artifacts/timeline-smoke-result.json", "artifacts/v1-3-compliance-smoke-result.json", "artifacts/fff-current-review-screenshot.png", "artifacts/fff-review-contact-sheet.png", "docs/review/current-status.md", "docs/review/checkpoint-readback.md", "docs/review/profile-ghost-flow-review.md", "docs/data-model.md"); $missing = $files | Where-Object { -not (Test-Path $_) }; if ($missing) { Write-Error ("Missing files: " + ($missing -join ", ")); exit 1 }; $manifest = Get-Content artifacts/artifact-manifest.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($manifest.artifact_id -ne "fff-profile-ghost-flow-001") { throw "Manifest artifact id mismatch" }; $checkpoint = Get-Content artifacts/checkpoint-readback-result.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; if (-not $checkpoint.passed) { throw "Checkpoint readback did not pass" }; $profileSmoke = Get-Content artifacts/profile-ghost-smoke-result.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; if (-not $profileSmoke.passed) { throw "Profile/Ghost smoke result did not pass" }; foreach ($jsonFile in @("artifacts/sample-project-state.json", "artifacts/current-project-state.json")) { node tools/fff-state.mjs validate $jsonFile; $state = Get-Content $jsonFile -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; if (-not ($state.extractedCandidates.profiles.Count -ge 11)) { throw ("Expected Profile/Ghost records in " + $jsonFile) }; if (-not ($state.extractedCandidates.claims.Count -ge 9)) { throw ("Expected Claim Ledger claims in " + $jsonFile) }; if (-not ($state.extractedCandidates.timelineCandidates.Count -ge 8)) { throw ("Expected Timeline View entries in " + $jsonFile) } }; $summary = node tools/fff-state.mjs summarize artifacts/current-project-state.json | ConvertFrom-Json; if (-not ($summary.profileSummary.totalProfiles -ge 11)) { throw "Profile summary missing or too small" }; if (-not ($summary.timelineSummary.totalTimelineEntries -ge 8)) { throw "Timeline summary missing or too small" }; @("artifacts/fff-current-review-screenshot.png", "artifacts/fff-review-contact-sheet.png") | ForEach-Object { $item = Get-Item $_; if ($item.Length -le 0) { throw ("Empty visual artifact: " + $_) } }; $html = Get-Content public/review/index.html -Raw; @("fff-profile-ghost-flow-001", "Visual Review Hub", "Profile/Ghost Flow", "Promote ghost to provisional profile", "Claim Ledger", "Timeline View", "Toma fate", "brass moth truth", "Council motive") | ForEach-Object { if ($html -notmatch [regex]::Escape($_)) { throw ("Missing required text: " + $_) } }; Write-Output "Profile/Ghost Flow validation passed" }
